headline: Oasis Reunion Tour Doc Rocks IMAX Before Disney+ Premiere
lede: The Gallagher brothers are set to dominate cinema screens with their hotly anticipated reunion tour documentary. Magna Studios and Sony Music Vision have crafted a cinematic experience promising an explosive look inside rock's most notorious brotherhood.
body:
## Magna's Blockbuster Music Doc Lands Premium Release Strategy

Disney has secured theatrical rights to the Oasis reunion tour documentary, orchestrating a strategic release that will maximize audience anticipation before its streaming debut. The film will first launch on premium IMAX and select cinema screens, giving fans an immersive, large-format experience of the band's momentous 2025 comeback.

### Behind the Scenes

The documentary promises an unprecedented look into the reunited Gallagher brothers, capturing the tension and musical chemistry that defined their legendary Manchester rock group. Industry insiders suggest the project represents more than a concert film — it's a nuanced exploration of sibling dynamics and musical reconciliation.

With IMAX screens confirmed for the initial release, the documentary signals a high-profile comeback for a band that defined British rock in the late 1990s and early 2000s. The theatrical window will likely generate significant buzz before the eventual Disney+ streaming premiere.

## Release Details

While exact premiere dates remain under wraps, sources close to the production indicate a late summer or early fall theatrical release. The documentary will likely feature never-before-seen backstage footage and intimate band interactions.
key_facts: Disney secured theatrical and streaming rights
IMAX release confirmed before streaming debut
